name: @stackra/cache
purpose: Client-side cache — Laravel-style facade, pluggable stores (memory, null, IndexedDB, localStorage), tag invalidation, TTLs, and React bindings.
capabilities: Cache facade with get / set / remember / forever / forget / flush
Pluggable stores: memory, null, storage, indexeddb, custom
Testing subpath with createMockCache assertion DSL
when_to_use: You need cache-aside reads, atomic counters, or tagged invalidation for client-side data.
when_not_to_use: For server-driven data fetching prefer @stackra/query; for persistent KV prefer @stackra/storage.
